_comments.ENABLED: Set to true to activate the trial link scanner.
_comments.POST_MODE: 'link' = post only the trial URL | 'full' = post the full message text that contains the link
_comments.POST_TIMING: 'immediate' = send a Discord message for each link as it is found | 'summary' = one Discord message at the end of the scrape with all links found
_comments.DISCORD_ENABLED: Set to false to disable Discord posting (links are still logged to the logs/ folder)
